stable_visual_summary: A Martian ruler and Jeddak of Helium, appearing as an elder statesman. The character is defined by grand royal regalia and ceremonial attire consistent with the Heliumite throne. He is visually associated with the leadership of the Heliumite people during periods of planetary crisis.
costume_signature: Grand royal regalia of the Heliumite throne.
relationship_notes: Leader of the royal group in the sunken garden.
continuity_constraints: Must maintain the visual identity of a high-ranking Martian ruler (Jeddak).
Costume must reflect Heliumite grand regalia.
unresolved_ambiguities: Conflicting data regarding whether the entity is a singular individual or a group entity.
Specific physical dimensions and movement patterns are not documented.
